title: Crystallium
body:
# Crystallium

## Overview
The Crystallium mod introduces a variety of new minerals and powerful consumables with powerful weapons to enhance your Minecraft experience. Discover and craft special items, and enjoy enhanced gameplay mechanics with new, dynamic food options and strong items.

## Features

### New Minerals & Crystals
- **🔷Sapphire**: A rare mineral with unique crafting capabilities.
- **🔴Ruby**: A sparkling gem that can be used to create food with good heal capabilities.
- **🟨Topaz**: A vibrant crystal with distinctive properties.
- **🟪Obsidian Crystal**: A sturdy and mystical element, perfect for crafting armor food.
- **🔲Ultimate Piece**: A rare and versatile item, used in high-end crafting recipes.

### Enhanced Foods
- **Sapphire Apple, Ruby Apple, Topaz Apple, Obsidian Apple, Lapis Apple, Diamond Apple, Netherite Apple, Copper Apple, Iron Apple, Coal Apple, Emerald Apple, Ultimate Apple**: Each of these apples provides unique buffs and effects when consumed, offering various benefits to enhance your survival.
- **Sapphire Carrot, Ruby Carrot, Topaz Carrot, Obsidian Carrot, Lapis Carrot, Diamond Carrot, Netherite Carrot, Copper Carrot, Iron Carrot, Coal Carrot, Emerald Carrot, Ultimate Carrot**: These carrots deliver specialized buffs and can be used strategically in various situations.

![all items](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d2089716d907caeb665d3e8ce851bacc3fbfbb5f.png)

### New Elements
- **Sapphire, Topaz, Ruby**: Mine default ore's, and with low chance you can get one of these new minerals.

### New Weapons
- **Ruby Gauntlets**: Powerful gauntlets on every arm, giving regeneration and giving wither effect to enemies
![Ruby Gauntlets](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0c618c8f7ad3676bc60c32bf24f43ff9b76529c9.png)
- **Topaz Spear**: Very *fast* spear, you enemy will never run from you!
![Topaz Spear](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4eb9c0be4b00d1dea36935bc7d460ac29b22976e.png)
- **Obsidian Mace**: Power of Obsidian grants high damage, but it slows you(trust me, its worth it!)
![Obsidian Mace](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/51e3415abe5c17fa4ac62af18cae9acdf71bc9d2.png)
- **Ultimate Katana**: Most powerful weapon in Crystallium, it spawns ***Lightning***, this is how powerful *Katana* is!
![Ultimate Katana](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9f1857649ee70963ca7fd27ec4f6975ac1b5aab5.png)

### Creative Tabs
- **Crystallium Tab**: Find all your crystals and new items in one convenient place.
- **Crystallium Food Tab**: All special food items from the Crystallium mod can be easily accessed here.
- **Crystallium Weapon Tab**: All special weapons from Crystallium mod can in one place.

## Purpose & Appeal
Crystallium enriches the Minecraft experience by adding layers of new content and opportunities for players. Whether you are exploring caves, gathering resources, or seeking powerful new items, Crystallium offers something valuable and exciting. Its diverse features cater to adventurers, builders, and survivalists, making it a must-have for anyone looking to enhance their game.

## Environment Information
Crystallium is a client-server compatible mod. To fully experience all the features, it is required on both the client and the server side.

P.S: mod still WIP, textures will change, its only first variant.
